task_description: End-to-end validation tests (TDD style), documentation polish (README, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SUMMARY.md), code cleanup, and final verification that cdk synth and tests pass

verification.summary: All 196 tests pass (87 new e2e validation + 109 existing). TypeScript compiles cleanly. CDK synth succeeds. Snapshot is up to date. Review feedback addressed: choice rule ordering resilience, Lambda mock duplication comment, .txt gap comment, dual Polly invocation documented.
